title: The Chain Warden
identity: Wicked and cunning, Thresh is a malevolent specter that delights in tormenting opponents, imprisoning their souls in his lantern for all eternity. He uses his chain to attack from tricky and unexpected angles, while his lantern lets him teleport and summon jailed souls for aid.
playstyle: Strategist. Wicked and cunning, Thresh is a malevolent specter that delights in tormenting opponents, imprisoning their souls in his lantern for all eternity. He uses his chain to attack from tricky and unexpected angles, while his lantern lets him teleport and summon jailed souls for aid.
strengths: Control/support identity with hook-style threat and team utility.
Can force respect through space denial and unusual angles.
Promising for teams that value positioning tools.
weaknesses: Newer roster knowledge needs more reviewed footage.
